news.paragraph: Apple is seeing positive momentum as Daiwa Securities raised its price target to $325 while the company explores integrating AI agents into the App Store. Traders should weigh these potential AI-driven growth catalysts and the recent analyst upgrade against ongoing regulatory discussions regarding EU antitrust measures.
headlines: Market Chatter: Apple Explores Ways to Better Integrate AI Agents Into App Store
